pi_items.source: Task description states 'SQLite database located at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_triggers.db'; confirmed in setup_task.sh which copies source chinook.db to this target path
Task description explicitly states 'Create a new DBeaver connection named ChinookTriggers (case-sensitive)'; verifier.py checks for exact match on line 52-54
Task description step 2 specifies 'Create a new table named audit_log'; table is checked in verifier.py line 62-66
Task description step 3 specifies 'Create three AFTER triggers on the customers table'; triggers are: INSERT (line 3), UPDATE (line 3), DELETE (line 3); verifier checks trigger_count >= 3 on line 70
Task description step 4A states 'INSERT a new customer (Id: 60)'; verified against Chinook database which has max CustomerId=59, so 60 is the next logical ID and does not currently exist
Task description step 4B states 'UPDATE CustomerId 1 (Luís Gonçalves)'; verified in Chinook database: CustomerId 1 is Luís Gonçalves with original email luisg@embraer.com.br
Task description step 4B specifies 'change Email to luis.goncalves@updated.com'; this exact value is checked in verifier.py line 33 and 84
Task description step 5 states 'Export the audit_log table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_log.csv'; checked in export_result.sh line 9 and verified in verifier.py
Task description step 6 states 'Save your SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/audit_triggers.sql'; checked in export_result.sh line 10 and verified in verifier.py

Verified by cross-referencing table row counts and customer data against official Chinook database. Source database at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db contains: artists=275, albums=347, tracks=3503, customers=59, invoices=412, employees=8, genres=25, media_types=5, playlists=18, playlist_track=8715. All counts match exactly with official Chinook sample database. Customer 1 is Luís Gonçalves (luisg@embraer.com.br) - real sample data from iTunes library.
Direct query of benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db: SELECT CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email FROM customers WHERE CustomerId = 1

pi_items.verified_value: Does not exist (max CustomerId in database is 59)
pi_items.source: Verified by query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE CustomerId = 60 returns 0; SELECT MAX(CustomerId) FROM customers returns 59

privileged_info_summary: The chinook_audit_triggers task requires implementing a database audit logging system on the Chinook sample database (a real, publicly available dataset from github.com/lerocha/chinook-database containing 59 customers, 412 invoices, 3503 tracks, and other music store data). The task requires creating a DBeaver connection to chinook_triggers.db, creating an audit_log table, implementing three AFTER triggers (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) on the customers table, performing test operations (insert customer 60, update customer 1 (Luís Gonçalves) email to luis.goncalves@updated.com, delete customer 60), and exporting results. All metadata values are verified: db_path, connection_name (ChinookTriggers), required_table (audit_log), required_triggers_count (3), test_record_id (60), update_record_id (1), updated_email (luis.goncalves@updated.com), and file paths are consistent with task description and scripts.
